visual_description: A close-up shows a silver Motorola phone screen displaying the number 454870 and Chinese characters, held in a hand. The camera pulls back to reveal a middle-aged man with gray hair wearing a light-colored shirt and a gray suit jacket, standing in a dim room with tiled walls while holding the phone and looking at it. The scene briefly shifts to a dark silhouette of a person in black observing a computer monitor before returning to the man in the suit as he continues to examine the device.
audio_description: The audio is not clearly audible.
